concept: Partner / One Who Completes a We
description: An individual who joins with another in equal measure to create a whole unit ('we'). This can apply to romantic, creative, or other forms of close, collaborative relationships.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'we' (the collective, 'we') and 'o' (wholeness). The word's structure literally means 'a collective made whole.' This defines a partner as the essential other half that creates a complete 'we.' The sound is simple and foundational, reflecting the core nature of partnership.
